shot_plan.purpose: Establish world, location, and scale before subject focus.
shot_plan.scene_progression: rain intensifies as she turns toward the skyline.

shot_plan.purpose: Follow subject through space to build momentum.
shot_plan.scene_progression: she walks along the platform edge with city lights pulsing below.

shot_plan.purpose: Present subject at peak visual power for final impression.
shot_plan.scene_progression: she reaches a dormant launch cradle and places her gloved hand on its surface.

shot_plan_summary: Clip 1: establishing_shot — rain intensifies as she turns toward the skyline.
Clip 2: tracking_shot — she walks along the platform edge with city lights pulsing below.
Clip 3: hero_shot — she reaches a dormant launch cradle and places her gloved hand on its surface.

camera_language.camera_movement: Slow wide push or locked wide frame with environmental depth layers.
camera_language.visual_objective: rain intensifies as she turns toward the skyline. — advance story beat with clear visual hierarchy

camera_language.camera_movement: Lateral or forward tracking matched to subject speed.
camera_language.framing: mid-wide tracking frame with lead room
camera_language.visual_objective: she walks along the platform edge with city lights pulsing below. — advance story beat with clear visual hierarchy

camera_language.camera_movement: Low or centered hero framing with controlled push-in or hold.
camera_language.framing: centered hero frame with chin-safe headroom
camera_language.visual_objective: she reaches a dormant launch cradle and places her gloved hand on its surface. — advance story beat with clear visual hierarchy
